name: AMD
rationale: AMD is the best long-only candidate in the watchlist: it clears the momentum gate in the provided market data (1M +17.32%, 3M +135.75%) and has the cleanest fresh catalyst stack. Reuters reported a Goldman target hike to $640, Citi put AMD on an upside catalyst watch list, and Turing said AMD Ventures joined its investor group while about 10% of Turing's AI training workloads moved from Nvidia har
